title: Section 11A
body: Section 11A in The Code of Civil Procedure, 1908 11A. . [Application for arrest to state grounds.- Where an application is made for the arrest and detention in prison of the judgment-debtor, it shall state, or be accompanied by an affidavit stating, the grounds on which arrest is applied for.] [Inserted by the Code of Civil Procedure (Amendment) Act, 1976, Section 72 (w.e.f. 1.2.1977).]
